---
title: "Elastic Net escenari nul"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-04-26"
output: html_document
---

# Elastic Net nul
```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_nul.RData")
library(glmnet)

resultats_fp_enet <- data.frame(
  N          = comb$N,
  pi         = comb$pi,
  corr       = comb$correlation,
  FP         = NA_real_,
  FP_percent = NA_real_
)

system.time({
  for (i in 1:nrow(comb)) {           
    N  <- comb$N[i]                  
    pi <- comb$pi[i]

    fp_enet <- numeric(iters)

    for (j in 1:iters) {
      cat("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j, "\n")

      X_mat <- as.matrix(X[[i]][[j]])
      y_bin <- Y[[i]][[j]]

      # FIX 3: extreure coeficients directament de cv.glmnet, sense cridar glmnet() a part
      lambda_estim <- cv.glmnet(X_mat, y_bin,
                                family = "binomial",
                                alpha  = 0.5,
                                nfolds = 5)           # 5 folds: 2x més ràpid

      coef_enet  <- coef(lambda_estim, s = "lambda.min")[-1]  # treu intercept
      fp_enet[j] <- sum(coef_enet != 0)
    }

    resultats_fp_enet$FP[i]         <- mean(fp_enet)
    resultats_fp_enet$FP_percent[i] <- mean(fp_enet) / num_vars
  }
})

print(resultats_fp_enet)
save(resultats_fp_enet, file = "resultats_fp_enet_nul.RData")
```
